card_budget_body: Plan by month, quarter, year or project-style context.
card_data_body: Keep long-term records portable and under your control.
card_flows_body: Reuse common income, expense, transfer and refund patterns.
card_goals_body: Connect budgets and accounts to longer-term targets.
card_insights_body: Use search, trends, charts and Cashflow Map to spot patterns.
card_investments_body: Review holdings, trades, deposits, withdrawals and value.
card_scenarios_body: Keep travel, family, side projects and other contexts clear.
card_widgets_body: Surface selected financial status in daily routines.
details_subtitle: WealthX keeps account structure, budget planning, recurring money flows, goals, investments, charts, widgets and data transfer in one place.
details_title: A personal finance workspace, not just a spending log.
faq1_a: No. Budget tracking is one part of the workspace. WealthX also tracks accounts, transactions, scenarios, Flows, investments, goals, insights, Cashflow Map, widgets and import/export workflows.
faq1_q: Is WealthX only a budget tracker?
faq2_a: A budget helps plan limits and targets. Cash flow shows how money moves over time. WealthX keeps both visible so planning and actual movement can be reviewed together.
faq2_q: How is budget tracking different from cash flow tracking?
faq3_a: Scenarios are separate financial contexts such as travel, family, side projects, pets, education or personal growth. They keep related records clear without forcing every part of life into one view.
faq4_a: Flows are reusable patterns for repeated income, expenses, transfers, refunds and recurring bills. They reduce repeated entry while keeping records manual and reviewable.
faq5_a: Yes. WealthX can track investment accounts, holdings, trades, deposits, withdrawals, buys, sells, market value and performance views alongside budgets and everyday transactions.
faq5_q: Can WealthX track investments with daily spending?
faq6_a: No. WealthX is manual-first and supports import/export workflows. It is designed for people who prefer direct control over their financial records.
faq6_q: Does WealthX require automatic bank sync?
faq7_a: WealthX supports data transfer workflows so records can remain portable for migration, backup routines or personal review outside the app.
faq8_a: WealthX uses a privacy-conscious Apple-platform workflow with local storage and optional iCloud sync. Some features, such as Cashflow Map, use optional permissions only when enabled.
feature_budget_body: Budgets aren't limited to a single flat monthly view. WealthX helps you plan across the periods and contexts that match how you actually use your money.
feature_budget_point1: Review budget progress across different timeframes.
feature_budget_point2: Separate daily spending from project-style plans.
feature_budget_point3: Connect budgets with goals and spending patterns.
feature_budget_title: Flexible budgets for months, quarters, years and projects.
feature_data_body: WealthX supports import and export workflows so personal financial records can remain portable over time.
feature_data_point1: Use data-transfer workflows for migration and backup routines.
feature_data_point2: Keep manual records understandable outside a single screen.
feature_data_point3: Use privacy-conscious Apple-platform storage and optional iCloud sync.
feature_data_title: Long-term records need an exit path.
feature_flows_body: Flows speed up common expenses, income, transfers, refunds and recurring bills without turning WealthX into a bank-sync app.
feature_flows_point1: Save repeated entries as structured templates.
feature_flows_point2: Use planned Flows for recurring bills that still need manual review.
feature_flows_point3: Reduce repeated input while keeping control over each record.
feature_flows_title: Reusable patterns for money you track again and again.
feature_goals_body: Goal Tracker helps you follow savings goals and financial targets with linked accounts, milestones, and progress views.
feature_goals_point1: Track progress toward savings and planning targets.
feature_goals_point2: Link goals with accounts to keep status grounded in records.
feature_goals_point3: Review how budgets and daily choices connect to progress.
feature_goals_title: Turn longer-term targets into visible progress.
feature_insights_body: Search, trends, distributions, and Cashflow Map make it easier to understand spending habits, budget progress, and money movement at a glance.
feature_insights_point1: Search across transactions, accounts, budgets, holdings, and Flows.
feature_insights_point2: Use charts to inspect trends and distributions.
feature_insights_point3: Use Cashflow Map when location permission is granted.
feature_investments_body: WealthX tracks investment accounts, holdings, trades, deposits, withdrawals, buys, sells, market value, and performance views without presenting investment advice.
feature_investments_point1: Review holdings and account value in one place.
feature_investments_point2: Record buys, sells, deposits, and withdrawals.
feature_investments_point3: Understand long-term assets alongside budgets and goals.
feature_scenarios_body: Travel, family, side projects, pets, education, or personal growth can have their own scenario, so budgets, accounts, and insights do not collapse into one noisy view.
feature_scenarios_point1: Switch between scenarios without rebuilding your records.
feature_scenarios_point2: Keep context-specific budgets and insights readable.
feature_scenarios_point3: Use one app while preserving separate views for different needs.
feature_scenarios_title: Keep each life context separate when it should be.
feature_widgets_body: Widgets help surface selected budgets, reminders, and financial status without requiring you to open the app for every glance.
feature_widgets_point1: Keep important budget signals close to daily routines.
feature_widgets_point2: Use widgets as lightweight reminders, not financial advice.
feature_widgets_point3: Connect app structure with system-level visibility.
feature_widgets_title: Finance status in the places you check every day.
features_subtitle: Daily spending, travel, family, side projects, long-term goals, and investments can stay separate where needed while still belonging to one system.
final_body: Use WealthX when your money no longer fits a simple monthly budget and you want daily spending, goals, investments, scenarios, and recurring money flows in one iOS workspace.
geo_block1_body: WealthX is a manual-first personal finance workspace for iOS. It organises accounts, budgets, transactions, investments, goals, scenarios, Flows, charts, widgets, and data transfer workflows.
geo_block1_title: What kind of finance app is WealthX?
geo_block2_body: It helps when one monthly budget is too simple for real life. Travel, family, side projects, pets, education, investments, and daily spending can stay structured without becoming separate spreadsheets.
geo_block3_body: WealthX does not promise guaranteed savings, investment advice, bank-level security, or fully automatic bank sync. It focuses on clear structure and user-controlled records.
geo_subtitle: These answers are written for people and for search systems that need to understand what WealthX is, what it is not, and how it fits a manual-first finance workflow.
geo_title: Is WealthX the right personal finance app for this job?
hero_subtitle: WealthX brings accounts, budgets, transactions, investments, goals, and cash flow into one organised iOS workspace, so everyday spending and long-term plans stay connected.
hero_title: A clearer structure for personal finance
home_current_body: WealthX 2.1.4 is the active homepage focus. Discontinued projects are not part of this site.
home_future_note: When a new product is ready, it can be added here as a separate product entry rather than being mixed into the WealthX page.
home_hero_subtitle: WealthX is the current product. This page keeps the product entry structure ready for more apps without mixing discontinued projects back in.
home_hero_title: One home for current and future WERD products.
home_meta_description: WERD product home. WealthX is the current personal finance product.
home_wealthx_desc: A manual-first iOS personal finance workspace for accounts, budgets, transactions, investments, goals, scenarios, Flows, widgets and import and export.
meta_description: WealthX is an iOS personal finance app that organises accounts, budgets, transactions, investments, goals, charts, scenarios and repeated money flows into a clear manual-first system.
meta_keywords: WealthX, personal finance workspace, manual-first finance app, budget and investment tracking, recurring money flows, scenarios, iCloud, import and export
og_description: Bring accounts, budgets, transactions, investments, goals and cash flow into one organised iOS workspace.
og_title: WealthX - A clearer structure for personal finance
privacy_contact_body: For privacy questions, contact us at
privacy_sec1_body: WealthX works with personal finance records that you create or import, including accounts, transactions, budgets, scenarios, Flows, investments, goals, chart settings, icons and related notes.
privacy_sec1_item1: Location is optional and is used for Cashflow Map only when permission is granted.
privacy_sec1_item2: Custom images, emoji and system symbols may be used for personalisation when you choose them.
privacy_sec1_item3: iCloud sync is optional and uses your Apple account and Apple platform infrastructure.
privacy_sec2_body: Data is used to provide app features such as bookkeeping, budgets, goals, investments, charts, search, widgets, import and export, and optional sync. WealthX does not operate advertising targeting within the app.
privacy_sec3_body: We do not sell personal finance data. We may disclose information only if required by law, where necessary to protect rights and safety, or if requested by you for support or data transfer.
privacy_sec4_body: WealthX uses local Apple-platform storage and optional iCloud sync. Apple account, device and iCloud settings affect storage and sync behaviour. No digital system should be treated as risk-free.
privacy_sec5_body: You control import and export workflows within WealthX. You can remove records in the app and manage app data through Apple-platform settings where applicable.
privacy_sec6_body: WealthX is not intended for children under the age required by local law to manage personal finance records without appropriate consent.
privacy_subtitle: WealthX is designed around user-controlled personal finance records, local Apple-platform storage, optional iCloud sync and clear data transfer workflows.
schema_feature_budget: Flexible budgets by month, quarter, year or project
schema_feature_goals: Savings goals and financial target tracking
schema_feature_insights: Search, charts, trends and Cashflow Map
schema_feature_widgets: iOS widgets for selected finance status
title: WealthX - A clearer structure for personal finance
